nasb.text: No man is to come up with you, nor let any man be seen anywhere on the mountain; even the flocks and the herds may not graze in front of that mountain.”

esv.text: No one shall come up with you, and let no one be seen throughout all the mountain. Let no flocks or herds graze opposite that mountain.”

cnv.text: 誰也不准同你一起上來，整個山都不准有人出現，也不准牛羊在這山前吃草。”

ccb.text: 谁也不可与你同来，整座山上都不可有人，就是牛羊也不得在山前吃草。”
